---
title: "Symposium Schedule"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> When
**Tuesday, May 26, 2026** 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Where
**University of Calgary** Main Campus, Calgary, AB  
*In-Person Event*
:::

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Preliminary Schedule
Please note that the following program is subject to change as speakers and sessions are finalized.
:::

| Time | Session |
|:--- |:--- |
| 09:00 | **Welcome & Opening Remarks** |
| 09:30 | **Invited Talk #1** (30 min + 15 min Q&A) |
| 10:15 | **Invited Talk #2** (30 min + 15 min Q&A) |
| 11:00 | **Coffee Break** |
| 11:15 | **Invited Talk #3** (30 min + 15 min Q&A) |
| 12:00 | **Lunch & Networking** (Provided for all attendees) |
| 13:15 | **Best Poster Highlights** (3 x 15 min rapid-fire talks) |
| 14:00 | **Panel Discussion:** The Future of Transdisciplinary AI |
| 14:45 | **Poster Session & Afternoon Coffee** |
| 16:30 | **Awards & Closing Remarks** |
| 17:00 | **Symposium Ends** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[20,80]"}

<br>

::: {.text-center}
Looking for the Call for Papers? [Click here to submit.](cfp.qmd)
:::
